final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: e-commerce key visual poster, tech-consumer brand promotional aesthetic
Composition: vertical poster layout, hero product (NAS device) centered or prominently featured, bold headline zone at top, promotional badge / burst element for 618 anniversary, CTA area at bottom
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud storage device as hero product, 618周年庆 sale event
Scene/backdrop: clean dark or deep-tech gradient background suggesting cloud / data / connectivity
Lighting/mood: vibrant, energetic, festive — tech-launch excitement with sale urgency
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary accent, deep navy or dark background, gold or bright yellow for 618 anniversary highlight
Materials/textures: glossy product render, subtle light-ray or particle effects suggesting digital cloud
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云  618周年庆
Constraints: product must be clearly legible, brand color green must appear prominently, 618 badge must be visually dominant
Avoid: generic stock-photo lifestyle scenes, cluttered layout, Western e-commerce style, mismatched colors that conflict with UGREEN green identity
